author: ESPN YouTube
text:
THRILLING ELIMINATION GAME FINISH 👀 Georgia Tech vs. Oklahoma | ESPN College Baseball
Watch the highlight as Oklahoma stuns the No. 2 Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets in the Atlanta Regional, after Dayton Tockey hit a walk-off home run in the bottom of the 10th inning to send the Sooners to the Super Regionals.
